finding: check_markdown_schema.py executes schema-supplied regex strings with no re.error guard or timeout; a crafted pattern hangs the gate, a malformed one crashes it.
recommendation: Wrap re.search/match/compile of schema strings in try/except re.error -> FAIL; validate patterns at load; add per-file timeout.

finding: am_i_done.py passes dispatch-rules.json 'pattern' to re.search per filename with no re.error catch; malformed pattern crashes the gate, catastrophic one hangs CI.
recommendation: try/except re.error -> FAIL naming the pattern; validate at _load.

category: PR body into subprocess env unbounded
finding: check_template places the full (attacker-controlled, up to 64KB) PR body into PR_BODY env with only NUL stripping; downstream regexes use (.*?)/DOTALL against it.
recommendation: Truncate PR_BODY to ~8KB; review check_pr_template.py backtracking exposure.

finding: 'make' in _VERIFY_DEFAULT_ALLOWLIST executes the committed Makefile (any shell recipe), transitively defeating the inline-code denylist.
recommendation: Move make/npm/pnpm out of defaults into opt-in [gate] allowed_commands with documented trust caveat. NOTE: re-litigates WORK-0021 accepted decision.

finding: _append_gate_insight does json.loads(open(marker).read()) — no context mgr, no encoding, no size bound; symlink to large file allocs unbounded under a silent except.
recommendation: with open(marker, encoding='utf-8') as fh: ...read(4096); mirror install._read_tier_marker.

finding: printf '%-36s' "$PROJECT_NAME" / phase value placed in printf format-arg position; operator-editable context.json can inject format directives.
recommendation: printf '%s' with value strictly in data position, or use echo. NOTE: WORK-0019 previously declared a printf-RCE a false positive; re-verify this variant.

category: dispatch pattern compiled at match time
finding: patterns recompiled per file-match rather than validated/compiled at load.
_append_gate_insight appends per gate run with no rotation; reflect.py loads whole file.
recommendation: Size/line cap + rotation; stream in reflect.py.

finding: budget_manager imports fcntl unconditionally; ImportError on Windows despite install.py Windows copy-mode guard.
recommendation: Guard import + no-op lock fallback, or declare Windows unsupported.

finding: check_markdown_schema.py opens an arbitrary --schemas path; low CI exposure (default fixed) but reads any accessible file.
recommendation: Validate resolved path within repo root when run inside a git repo.
